2026-03-30T20:41:20.3717029Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-03-30T20:41:20.3717607Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-03-30T20:41:20.3718041Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-03-30T20:41:20.3718485Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-03-30T20:41:20.3719085Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-03-30T20:41:20.3719598Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
